intro: The cutest, toughest squad in town is here! A pink smoke grenade lights up a neon-lit city, and the Cutie Squad is ready to save the day!
description:
Powered by cutting-edge cartoon rendering and cel-shading technology, Cutie Squad: Crime War delivers a totally fresh anime-style girls' TPS experience! A glittering modern metropolis packed with neon lights and soaring skyscrapers looks dazzling on the surface. But deep in the shadows, the ruthless criminal cartel "Black Mamma" is tightening its grip on the city, armed with next-level hacking tools and illegal firepower, all aimed at seizing the city's financial networks and energy grid. The last police barricades crumble, and right at that moment, a bright pink smoke grenade lands in the middle of the panicking crowd. Out of the swirling smoke walks the leader of the Cutie Squad, cool smile and all, rocking a police tactical uniform like she owns the place. Meet Yuna, sharp and unstoppable with her purple bob and a fighting spirit to match! "Looks like my shopping trip is cancelled today. Guess I will just clean up all the trash in this city instead!"

・Spend the Gold you earn clearing stages to collect Yuna's one-of-a-kind costume lineup, each one more adorable than the last!
・Every costume you unlock comes with its very own exclusive original wallpaper themed around that outfit. Collecting has never felt this good!
・Switch to SHOW Mode on any collected costume and discover a second hidden original wallpaper. Trust us, you will want to see them all!
・Tap on Yuna and watch her light up with reactions ranging from bright and bubbly to the most endearingly shy responses you have ever seen!
・Fire up the Character Viewer and admire your collected costumes from every angle. Yuna's cuteness is simply off the charts!
・When the Cutie Squad logo blazes across the city's giant billboard, it means one thing: the grand finale is here. A special ending unlocked only for players who complete the full story. The shocking secret behind Black Mamma and a truth only Yuna has been keeping will finally come to light!

Behind that gorgeous smile is an unstoppable fighting spirit, and Yuna's action-packed mission to take back the city kicks off right now! Explosive city-shaking action, an irresistibly cute costume collection, secret wallpapers to hunt down, gallery collectibles to uncover, and a story ending that will blow your mind. It is all packed in and ready to go! A bold new evolution of the visual-style TPS, loaded with cuteness, firepower, and personality that just will not quit. Join the Cutie Squad, the cutest and most fearless crew the city has ever seen, and save the day starting today!

Prologue
A gleaming modern city, lit up by neon signs and towering skyscrapers. On the surface, everything looks alive and thriving. But in the shadows, the criminal cartel called "Black Mamma" has been quietly strangling the city from the inside out. Equipped with next-level hacking tools and illegal armed forces, they have set their sights on taking over the city's key financial networks and power infrastructure. The police do not stand a chance against their overwhelming firepower.

Then, right in the middle of a panicking crowd, a bright pink smoke grenade hits the ground and goes pop! Through the swirling smoke comes the sharp click of heels on pavement. Striding out with total confidence, armed with a machine gun and a sniper rifle that weirdly suit her perfectly, Yuna steps forward with a beaming smile that lights up the whole street. The Cutie Squad has arrived!

"Looks like my shopping trip is getting cancelled today. Guess I have got a city to save instead!" With that one breezy line, an upbeat rock track kicks in and the real fight is on. Across every public screen in the city, the emergency broadcast cuts to static, then gets replaced by the glowing Cutie Squad logo. Just like that, the girls walk forward like they own the whole city, sweeping through enemy lines and pushing deeper into the heart of the action!
